title: geranium pyrenaicum subsp. lusitanicum
intro: Geranium pyrenaicum subsp. lusitanicum, also known as the Iberian geranium, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Geranium pyrenaicum subsp. lusitanicum include reducing symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as providing relief from anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
